name: Bausch Health Companies Inc.
summary: PART I Introduction Bausch Health Companies Inc. (we, us, our, the Company or Bausch Health) is a global, diversified specialty pharmaceutical and medical device company that develops, manufactures and markets, primarily in the therapeutic areas of gastroenterology (GI), hepatology, neurology and dermatology, a broad range of branded, generic and branded generic pharmaceuticals, over-the-counter (OTC) products and aesthetic medical devices and, through our approximately 88% ownership of Bausch +...
